Package io.vertigo.commons.peg

Class PegEnumRuleHelper

java.lang.Object
io.vertigo.commons.peg.PegEnumRuleHelper
public class PegEnumRuleHelper extends Object
Helper for enum rules.
Author:
skerdudou
